data.title: Push Security Wins Pinnacle Award for Best AI-Powered Threat Detection
data.description: Push Security, based in Boston, has recently been honored with the Best AI-Powered Threat Detection award. The award serves as recognition for Push Security's innovative AI-native browser security platform. This accomplishment showcases Push Security's dedication to utilizing cutting-edge technology to enhance threat detection capabilities.

data.title: Coface SA: Disclosure of total number of voting rights and number of shares in the capital as at 30 June 2026
data.description: COFACE SA has reported the total number of voting rights and shares in the capital as of 30 June 2026. The disclosed information includes the total number of voting rights and the number of shares currently held by shareholders in the company. This data is vital for investors and stakeholders to understand the corporate structure and decision-making processes within COFACE SA. It provides transparency and clarity regarding the ownership and voting power within the organization.

data.title: AI tool Harvey expedites demand letter drafting for legal teams, improving efficiency and accuracy. #legaltech #AI
data.description: Artificial intelligence tools such as Harvey are revolutionizing legal processes by speeding up the creation of demand letters while ensuring precision and adherence to regulations. These tools are drastically reducing the time required for drafting demand letters, increasing efficiency by up to 50%, and minimizing errors to almost zero. This technological advancement is reshaping the legal industry by streamlining workflows and enhancing overall productivity.

data.title: Rival Systems Named Best Market Risk Solution Provider in the 2026 Waters Technology Rankings
data.description: Rival Systems, a prominent provider of enterprise trading and risk management technology for institutional firms based in Chicago, has been awarded as the Best Market Risk Solution Provider in the 2026 Waters Technology Rankings. This accolade highlights Rival's dedication to innovation in enterprise risk management and its consistent delivery of advanced technology supported by top-tier client service. This recognition adds to their achievements in the industry.

data.title: Edge226 Acquires AnyClip Ltd. to Power the Future of AI-Powered Cross-Channel Performance Marketing
data.description: Edge226 has recently acquired a new company in Tel Aviv, Israel, on July 2, 2026. This acquisition will enhance Edge226's capabilities in video intelligence, AI, and cross-channel advertising across various platforms including CTV, mobile web, in-app, and rewarded advertising. Edge226 specializes in providing performance marketing services for mobile apps and games. This strategic move is expected to significantly strengthen their presence in the market and improve their ability to reach a wider audience.

data.title: Facephi Reinforces Its Presence in the Regulated Gaming Industry Following Successful Deployment with The OxiaCore Project
data.description: Facephi has expanded its reach in the regulated gaming industry by partnering with The OxiaCore Project. The successful deployment of Facephi's technology has solidified its position in this sector. This strategic move to collaborate with The OxiaCore Project signifies a significant step forward for Facephi, as it continues to establish itself as a key player in the industry. This partnership highlights Facephi's commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions tailored to the gaming sector. The specific numbers regarding the success and impact of this deployment have not been disclosed, but it marks a notable development for Facephi in the regulated gaming industry.

data.title: Cumberland Farms Limited Files Registration Statement for Proposed Initial Public Offering
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina-based company Cumberland Farms Limited has made public its intention to conduct an initial public offering of its ordinary shares. The registration statement on Form F-1 has been filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, although the exact number of shares to be offered and the price range have not yet been specified. Cumberland Farms is seeking to list its ordinary shares on the Nasdaq Global Select Market using the ticker symbol "CMBY."

data.title: Aedifica NV/SA: Publication relating to a transparency notification
data.description: Aedifica, a publicly regulated real estate company in Belgium listed on Euronext Brussels and Euronext Amsterdam, recently released a press statement concerning a transparency notification from Stichting Pensioenfonds ABP. This notification disclosed a decrease in voting rights below the threshold of 5% as a result of a transfer of 550,000 shares. Aedifica holds a total of 41,363,898 shares outstanding, with Stichting Pensioenfonds ABP's current stake set at 4.96%. This communication aims to provide transparency and comply with regulatory requirements.

data.title: Elis strengthens presence in Brazil with acquisition of ServBrazil, expanding network further.
data.description: The recent report reveals that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the past week, with a total of 10,000 new cases being reported. This surge in cases has led to a total of 50,000 active cases in the country. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines to help curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, the report stated that there have been 500 new hospitalizations in the last week, bringing the total number of COVID-19 patients in hospitals to 2,000. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to control the situation.

data.title: Jersey Mike's Publicly Files Registration Statement for Initial Public Offering of Class A Common Stock
data.description: A press release dated July 2, 2026, stated that Jersey Mike's Subs Inc., a company based in Tinton Falls, New Jersey, has submitted a registration statement on Form S-1 to the Securities and Exchange Commission. This filing pertains to their planned initial public offering of Class A shares. The exact number of shares to be offered and the price range for the offering have not been disclosed yet. Jersey Mike's, often referred to as the Company, is taking steps to make this public offering.
